name: multiple operators can resolve different decisions in parallel and both resolutions are persisted
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","resolved":false}\n{"pattern_id":"p2","resolved":false}\n' > pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/resolve-conflict.sh" --pattern p1 --resolution accept --log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/resolve-conflict.sh" --pattern p2 --resolution defer --log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"pattern_id":"p1".*"resolved":true' pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && grep -q '"pattern_id":"p2".*"resolved":true' pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
